untranslatable_reason: Original signal specifies 'Price decline >= 2 standard deviations below 20-day moving average' which requires custom standard deviation calculation not available in allowed indicators. Also requires 'Close above intraday low by at least 0.5% within same session' which cannot be expressed with allowed operators (requires intra-bar logic). The signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction but requires LONG countertrend entry logic.
translation_notes: Translated core intent using available indicators: price below SMA_20 (downtrend proxy), vol_ratio_20 for volume spike, rsi_14 < 30 for oversold confirmation. Exit conditions simplified to profit target (2% per signal) and stop-loss. Could not capture exact 2-sigma deviation or same-session intrabar reversal requirement. Signal mixing CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction with explicit countertrend strategy suggests need for regime-aware position sizing rather than simple LONG/SHORT split.
